chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No. S-855 of 2022 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 07.08.2023 None present for the Petitioner. Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. Mr. Ghulam Akbar Uqaili, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh along with SIP Adeel Ahmed of P.S Sukhan & SIP Muhammad Iqbal of P.S Quaidabad, Karachi. -x-x-x-x-x- On 10.01.2023, official respondents had filed their comments as well as reports. Report submitted by SIP/I.O Touheed Ahmed Memon of P.S New Foujdari, Shikarpur is to the effect, he had disposed of the FIR No.127/2022 registered with P.S New Foujdari, Shikarpur under Section 365-B PPC, under ‘C’ class and such report in terms of section 173 Cr.P.C was also submitted before the Court having jurisdiction on 09.01.2023. Learned Deputy P.G, Sindh as well as Assistant A.G, Sindh submit that in view of report submitted by the I.O, purpose of instant petition has been served, therefore, seek its disposal. Record supports their contention. Order accordingly. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
